title: feat: announce hourly refills for flower & nectar tiers
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: A steady drip of pollen
gist.blurb: Flower and Nectar tiers now get their pollen refilled every single hour. No more waiting for the daily reset to keep building!
gist.summary: Updated the site's news banner to announce that Flower and Nectar tiers now receive hourly pollen refills instead of daily.
gist.impact: Users on the Flower and Nectar tiers will see a steady stream of credits throughout the day, making it easier to prototype without hitting sudden limits.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about hourly refills of pollen/credits for the higher tiers (Flower and Nectar). Visual symbols: Pollen drops, hourglass/clock, flowers, nectar jars. Characters: Polly the bee. Scene: Polly watching a steady drip of glowing pollen into a jar, with a clock or hourglass motif.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny watch, happily catching glowing drops of golden pollen falling from a large pixelated hourglass into a nectar jar. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny watch, happily catching glowing drops of golden pollen falling from a large pixelated hourglass into a nectar jar. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
